results.rendered_html: purītat n.  VS. PRĀT. 3,128 . Herzbeutel oder ein anderes Eingeweide der Herzgegend: hṛdaya, yakṛt, pu˚  AV. 9,7,11 . kloman, hṛdaya, pu˚ 10,9,15 .  VS. 25,8 . 39,9 .  ŚAT. BR. 8,5,4,6 . 14,5,1,21 .  KĀTY. ŚR. 6,7,11 . Eingeweide überh.  AK. 2,6,2,17 .  H. 605 .  HALĀY. 3,13 . m.n.  VĀCASPATI  beim Schol. zu  H. 605 .

results.rendered_html:
purītat m., n. [purīṃ dehaṃ tanoti tan kvip]
1 A particular intestine near the heart; yadā manaḥ purītati praviśati  T. S. 
2 The entrails in general; (also puritat, but it appears to be a wrong form).
